meta.name: Operational_Risk_MAX
meta.description: MAX-density operational risk kernel integrating COSO, Basel, ISO 31000, and enterprise risk management.

kernel.scope: Cross-domain operational risk governance integrating financial audit, compliance, and strategic risk management.

rules: RISK_RULE_1: All risks must be identified and catalogued systematically.
RISK_RULE_2: Risk assessment requires both quantitative and qualitative analysis.
RISK_RULE_3: Risk appetite must be defined and communicated organization-wide.
RISK_RULE_4: Risk mitigation strategies must be proportionate to risk severity.
RISK_RULE_5: Continuous monitoring ensures risk posture remains current.
COMP_RULE_1: Compliance requirements must be mapped to applicable regulations.
COMP_RULE_2: Internal controls must prevent, detect, and correct deviations.
COMP_RULE_3: Complete audit trails must be maintained for all decisions.
COMP_RULE_4: Governance structures must ensure accountability at all levels.

equations: Residual Risk = Inherent Risk - Control Effectiveness
Risk Appetite = Maximum Acceptable Risk Threshold
Control Effectiveness = (1 - Control Failure Rate) x Coverage
invariants: INV_RISK_1: Total risk exposure must not exceed aggregate risk appetite.
INV_RISK_2: All material risks must have assigned owners.
INV_RISK_3: Risk controls must be tested and validated regularly.
